codes.term: Neovascular glaucoma due to diabetes mellitus type 2 (disorder)
codes.rationale: Neovascular glaucoma due to diabetes mellitus type 2 is a complication of diabetes, not an instance of diabetes itself; the term does not name diabetes as the primary condition.

codes.term: Neuropathic arthropathy due to diabetes mellitus (disorder)
codes.rationale: Neuropathic arthropathy due to diabetes mellitus is a complication of diabetes, not an instance of diabetes itself.
Codes for 'resolved' or 'in remission' conditions should be excluded as they do not confirm the patient currently has active diabetes mellitus.

codes.term: Type I diabetes mellitus in remission (disorder)
codes.rationale: Type I diabetes in remission represents resolved disease and should be excluded; remission codes do not confirm active diabetes.

codes.term: Type II diabetes mellitus in remission (disorder)
codes.rationale: Type II diabetes in remission represents resolved disease and should be excluded; remission codes do not confirm active diabetes.

summary: Recall: 69.8% (60 of 86 reference codes retrieved). Precision: 82.2%. F1: 75.5%. 14 reference codes were incorrectly excluded.
